code:
import io
import string
import list

let target_opt = io.read_line()
let target = match target_opt
when Some(t)
  t
when None
  ""
end

let body = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(body)

mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    if tok == target
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    count = count
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("count=#{count}")
